title: Vuchelle
content:

{{Quote|Four of the Z-95s were destroyed with no survivors, though one Headhunter is unaccounted for, but is believed to have succumbed to the gravity well of nearby Vuchelle and burned up on reentry.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|jediwatch/13328_1.html|Jedi Smash Iridium Pirates; 3 Knights Killed}}</ref>}}
'''Vuchelle''' was an orange-[[Color/Legends|colored]] astronomical object located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]]. Situated along the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], Vuchelle in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] became the site of attempted negotiations between a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-led [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] and the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|pirates of Iridium]], who had been committing raids against Republic [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]]. The [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] [[Skirmish over Vuchelle|attacked]] the Jedi task force but were eventually defeated, with one of their [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|starfighters]] believed to have reentered Vuchelle's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and [[Fire/Legends|burned]] up as a result.

==Description==
Vuchelle was an astronomical object located in the [[Vuchelle system/Legends|Vuchelle system]], a part of the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] connected it to the [[Fedje system/Legends|Fedje system]] as well as the [[Isiring system/Legends|Isiring system]] in the neighboring [[Cassander sector/Legends|Cassander sector]].<ref name="TEA Vuchelle" /> Vuchelle appeared orange-[[Color/Legends|colored]] from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and had a sufficiently dense [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] for unprotected [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to [[Fire/Legends|burn]] up on reentry.<ref name="HNN" />

==History==
{{Quote|Sensor reports from the Atrivis sector issued by the Judicial Department confirm that a Jedi task force has thrashed the space pirates of Iridium, bringing an end to their year-long raids along the Atrivis sector routes.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
[[File:Atrivis-TEA.png|thumb|right|220px|Vuchelle was situated in the Atrivis sector.]]
By the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:28]], the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|pirates of Iridium]] had been committing [[Standard year/Legends|year]]-long raids on [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Grain/Legends|grain]] and [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] along the Atrivis [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] routes,<ref name="HNN" /> including ambushes near Vuchelle.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|49|Hokken, Dovish}}</ref> In response, a joint [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]–[[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] was dispatched from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="HNN" /> the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The task force attempted to initiate peaceful negotiations with the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in the Vuchelle [[Star system/Legends|system]], but the raiders [[Skirmish over Vuchelle|opened fire]].<ref name="HNN" />

In the ensuing confrontation that took place near Vuchelle, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] defeated the pirate force, disabling or destroying most of the enemy craft. Following the skirmish, one of the pirates' [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] was unaccounted for, and it was later reported in an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] that the fighter was believed to have succumbed to Vuchelle's [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] and burned up in the astronomical object's atmosphere.<ref name="HNN" /> Vuchelle fell within the borders of the [[Pentastar Alignment]] between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]<ref name="TEA" /> and was situated in the territory of the [[Imperial Remnant]] between 12 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vuchelle was first featured in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #49'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]], illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]],<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[March 28]], [[2002]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6217551|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Dev Sibwarra|date=2002-03-28|time=4:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vuchelle system, and therefore Vuchelle itself, in grid square L-5.<ref name="TEA Vuchelle" />
